# clean: af clean reaps workstreams in a terminal lifecycle state.
#
# Fixtures (none has a [pr] section, so no PR refresh fires):
#   done1 — completed  -> reaped by default
#   gone2 — abandoned  -> reaped only with --include-abandoned
#   live  — active     -> never reaped
#
# Failure path: an unparsable --max-age duration.

env HOME=$WORK/home

# ── Failure: bad --max-age duration ───────────────────────────────────────────
! exec af clean --max-age bogus
stderr 'clean: parse --max-age'

# Nothing was touched by the failed run.
exists $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/done1/state.toml
exists $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/gone2/state.toml
exists $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/live/state.toml

# ── Dry run reports without removing ──────────────────────────────────────────
exec af clean --dry-run
stdout 'would remove done1'
! stdout 'removed '
! stdout 'gone2'
! stdout 'live'

exists $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/done1/state.toml
exists $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/gone2/state.toml
exists $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/live/state.toml

# ── Real clean reaps only the completed workstream ────────────────────────────
exec af clean
stdout 'removed done1'
! stdout 'gone2'
! stdout 'live'

! exists $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/done1
exists $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/gone2/state.toml
exists $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/live/state.toml

# ── Abandoned workstreams need --include-abandoned ────────────────────────────
exec af clean
stdout 'nothing to clean'

exec af clean --include-abandoned
stdout 'removed gone2'
! stdout 'live'

! exists $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/gone2
exists $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/live/state.toml

# ── Initial file content ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- home/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/done1/state.toml --
schema_version = 1

[session]
id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001"
name = "done1"
status = "completed"
created_at = 2026-05-20T10:00:00Z

[worktree]
path = "/tmp/worktree-done1"
branch = "feat/done1"
base_branch = "main"

[execution]
tmux_session = "af-done1"

-- home/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/gone2/state.toml --
schema_version = 1

[session]
id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002"
name = "gone2"
status = "abandoned"
created_at = 2026-05-20T11:00:00Z

[worktree]
path = "/tmp/worktree-gone2"
branch = "feat/gone2"
base_branch = "main"

[execution]
tmux_session = "af-gone2"

-- home/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/live/state.toml --
schema_version = 1

[session]
id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000003"
name = "live"
status = "active"
created_at = 2026-05-22T12:00:00Z

[worktree]
path = "/tmp/worktree-live"
branch = "feat/live"
base_branch = "main"

[execution]
tmux_session = "af-live"
